description_long: This street food stall features a sturdy wooden base with a rectangular footprint, topped by a large, draped red canopy supported by four vertical poles. The front of the stall is open, with a serving counter displaying a checkered cloth, a chalkboard menu, and baskets of produce or goods. Decorative elements include hanging plants and string lights, adding a festive and inviting atmosphere. The side panels are partially enclosed with wooden planks, while the back is fully closed off, providing storage or workspace. Two chalkboard signs are positioned on either side of the stall, likely for menu or promotional use. The overall design is practical and welcoming, suitable for urban streets, parks, or markets.
description: A wooden street food stall with a red canopy, open front counter, chalkboard signs, and festive string lights. Decorative plants and baskets of goods enhance its inviting, market-style appearance.
description_view_0: The front-left view shows the open serving counter with a checkered cloth, chalkboard menu, baskets, and a hanging plant on the left side.
description_view_1: The direct front view highlights the open counter, string lights, and two chalkboard signs flanking the stall.
description_view_2: The front-right view reveals the right-side wooden enclosure, baskets, and the angled chalkboard menu at the front.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the fully enclosed wooden back of the stall, with no visible openings or decorations.
attribute_signage: Two black chalkboard signs with white writing and colored borders are placed at the front corners, and a smaller chalkboard menu stands on the front counter. All signage is hand-written style.
attribute_serving_counter: The serving counter is rectangular, made of wood, and covered with a checkered cloth. It features a chalkboard menu and baskets for goods, with no glass shield or cash register visible.
attribute_food_display: Food or goods are displayed openly in baskets and on the counter, easily accessible to customers, with no protective covering.
attribute_architectural_style: rustic market stall with festive accents
